assertions: Flags that the Manager calls InsertAsync / UpdateAsync (i.e. persists), and states this is wrong because domain services must not persist
Recommends switching the Manager's injected repositories to IReadOnlyRepository<T, Guid> (for Customer and Order)
Corrected ChangePriceAsync receives an Order as a parameter from the caller rather than loading it via _orderRepository.GetAsync(orderId) inside the Manager
Corrected CreateAsync returns the new Order without calling InsertAsync inside the Manager
Shows an OrderAppService that orchestrates: holds the tracking IRepository<Order, Guid>, mints Id via GuidGenerator, calls the Manager, and persists with InsertAsync/UpdateAsync
